fa-diagram-project.appearanceId: three nodes connected by lines in a branching project flow structure
fa-diagram-project.intentId: visualize task dependencies in a project

fa-diagram-sankey.appearanceId: wide flow bands branching and narrowing between left and right columns of nodes

fa-diagram-subtask.appearanceId: parent node connected by lines to two indented child nodes below
fa-diagram-subtask.intentId: see child tasks under a parent task

fa-diagram-successor.appearanceId: two boxes connected by a rightward arrow indicating sequential order
fa-diagram-successor.functionalityId: navigate to the next task in sequence
fa-diagram-successor.intentId: identify which task follows the current one

fa-diagram-venn.appearanceId: two overlapping circles forming a Venn diagram with shared center region
fa-diagram-venn.intentId: identify shared or unique attributes between groups

fa-display-arrow-down.appearanceId: desktop monitor screen with a downward-pointing arrow displayed on it
fa-display-arrow-down.functionalityId: download or push content to display
fa-display-arrow-down.intentId: send or save content from the screen

fa-display-chart-up.appearanceId: desktop monitor showing an upward-trending line chart
fa-display-chart-up.functionalityId: view analytics or growth chart on screen
fa-display-chart-up.intentId: monitor rising performance metrics on display

fa-display-chart-up-circle-currency.appearanceId: desktop monitor with upward chart and a small circle containing a generic currency symbol in corner
fa-display-chart-up-circle-currency.functionalityId: view financial growth chart on display

fa-display-chart-up-circle-dollar.appearanceId: desktop monitor with upward chart and a small circle containing a dollar sign in corner
fa-display-chart-up-circle-dollar.functionalityId: view dollar-denominated growth chart on display
fa-display-chart-up-circle-dollar.intentId: track dollar-value performance metrics on screen

fa-dna.appearanceId: double helix strand with horizontal rungs twisting vertically

fa-dog.appearanceId: dog silhouette with four legs, floppy ear, tail, and snout facing right
fa-dog.intentId: find information related to dogs or pets

fa-dog-leashed.appearanceId: dog silhouette with a leash line extending upward from collar
fa-dog-leashed.functionalityId: manage or log a leashed pet
fa-dog-leashed.intentId: indicate a dog on a leash or pet walking

fa-dove.appearanceId: dove bird silhouette with wings spread wide in flight facing right
fa-dove.functionalityId: send a peace or message symbol
fa-dove.intentId: represent peace, hope, or a sent message

fa-download.appearanceId: downward arrow pointing into a horizontal line at the bottom

fa-dragon.appearanceId: dragon silhouette with wings, horns, tail, and clawed legs
fa-dragon.intentId: represent a dragon character or fantasy theme

fa-dumbbell.appearanceId: horizontal bar with large round weight plates on each end
fa-dumbbell.functionalityId: log or browse fitness or workout data
fa-dumbbell.intentId: track exercise or access gym features

fa-egg.appearanceId: smooth oval egg shape wider at bottom
fa-egg.functionalityId: add or label an egg item
fa-egg.intentId: represent an egg in food or nature context

fa-egg-fried.appearanceId: fried egg with round yolk centered on an irregular white spread
fa-egg-fried.functionalityId: add or label a fried egg item
fa-egg-fried.intentId: represent a cooked egg in a food context

fa-ellipsis.appearanceId: three small dots arranged horizontally in a row
fa-ellipsis.functionalityId: open overflow or additional options menu
fa-ellipsis.intentId: access more actions not currently shown

fa-envelope.appearanceId: rectangular envelope shape with a V-shaped flap at top
fa-envelope.functionalityId: compose or open an email message
fa-envelope.intentId: send or view an email or message

fa-eraser.appearanceId: rectangular eraser block with a angled bottom edge
fa-eraser.intentId: remove drawn marks or typed text

fa-exclamation.appearanceId: vertical exclamation mark with dot below
fa-exclamation.intentId: draw attention to an important notice

fa-expand.appearanceId: four corner arrows pointing outward toward the edges of a square boundary
fa-expand.intentId: enlarge content to fill available space

fa-eye.appearanceId: almond-shaped eye outline with a circular pupil in the center

fa-eye-slash.appearanceId: almond-shaped eye outline with a diagonal slash line across it

fa-face-angry-horns.appearanceId: round face with furrowed brows, frown, and small horns on top

fa-face-anguished.appearanceId: round face with raised inner brows, wide open eyes, and wavy open mouth
fa-face-anguished.intentId: convey intense pain or emotional suffering

fa-face-anxious-sweat.appearanceId: round face with furrowed brows, nervous expression, and sweat drop on side

fa-face-astonished.appearanceId: round face with wide open eyes and O-shaped mouth

fa-face-beam-hand-over-mouth.appearanceId: round face with smiling eyes and a hand covering the mouth
fa-face-beam-hand-over-mouth.intentId: convey gleeful astonishment or shy happiness

fa-face-clouds.appearanceId: round face partially obscured by cloud shapes in front
fa-face-clouds.intentId: convey unclear thoughts or mental haze

fa-face-confounded.appearanceId: round face with X eyes and open mouth
fa-face-confounded.intentId: convey being completely stumped or defeated

fa-face-confused.appearanceId: round face with uneven raised brow and crooked mouth expression
fa-face-confused.intentId: convey puzzlement or a questioning feeling

fa-face-cowboy-hat.appearanceId: round face wearing a wide-brimmed cowboy hat
fa-face-cowboy-hat.intentId: convey a country, western, or rugged mood

fa-face-diagonal-mouth.appearanceId: round face with a diagonal slanted mouth and neutral eyes

fa-face-disappointed.appearanceId: round face with downturned mouth and sad eyes

fa-face-disguise.appearanceId: round face with disguise glasses and nose attached
fa-face-disguise.intentId: convey a joke, disguise, or hidden identity

fa-face-dotted.appearanceId: round face with small dots scattered across it instead of normal features
fa-face-dotted.functionalityId: represent an abstract or spotted face
fa-face-dotted.intentId: indicate an unusual or placeholder facial state

fa-face-downcast-sweat.appearanceId: round face with downturned mouth, downcast eyes, and a sweat drop
fa-face-downcast-sweat.intentId: convey shame, exhaustion, or sad stress

fa-face-drooling.appearanceId: round face with drool drop from corner of mouth
fa-face-drooling.intentId: convey strong desire or appetite for something

fa-face-exhaling.appearanceId: round face with puffed cheek and air stream blowing outward from mouth
fa-face-exhaling.intentId: convey letting go of stress or catching breath

fa-face-explode.appearanceId: round face with top of head blowing off in an explosion burst

fa-face-expressionless.appearanceId: round face with flat horizontal line mouth and neutral open eyes

fa-face-eyes-xmarks.appearanceId: round face with X marks for both eyes and a neutral mouth
fa-face-eyes-xmarks.intentId: convey being knocked out or overwhelmed

fa-face-fearful.appearanceId: round face with wide open eyes, raised brows, and small open mouth in fear
fa-face-fearful.intentId: convey terror or an alarming reaction

fa-face-frown-slight.appearanceId: round face with slightly curved downward mouth and neutral eyes
fa-face-frown-slight.functionalityId: express mild displeasure or slight sadness
fa-face-frown-slight.intentId: convey a subtle negative or unhappy feeling
